purpose: Official public datasets for Prelude college planning, school comparison, affordability, and major/career exploration.

datasets.name: College Scorecard — Most Recent Institution-Level Data
datasets.notes: The script discovers the current official ZIP URL from the College Scorecard data page before using the fallback.

datasets.name: College Scorecard — Most Recent Field-of-Study Data
datasets.notes: The script discovers the current official ZIP URL from the College Scorecard data page before using the fallback.

datasets.name: O*NET Database — Tab-Delimited Text Files
datasets.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor, Employment and Training Administration
datasets.license: CC BY 4.0. Attribute O*NET database content to USDOL/ETA and indicate modifications.
datasets.notes: The script discovers the newest official text ZIP URL from the O*NET database page before using the fallback.

optional_later.name: IPEDS Complete Data Files
optional_later.notes: IPEDS downloads are selected by survey and year. Add specific IPEDS files later only when Prelude needs variables not already exposed through College Scorecard.
